violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both kitchen prep units. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026

The door to the basement toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation areas shall be self-closing to prevent potential contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026
